name: Outpatient Weight-Loss Workup Labs

results.name: AFP (alpha-fetoprotein)
results.interpretation: Mildly elevated and nonspecific in cirrhosis; prompts dedicated liver imaging (which was pending when she presented acutely).

interpretation: Initial outpatient evaluation of the involuntary weight loss: anemia and worsening liver synthetic markers consistent with progressing cirrhosis; normal thyroid and glycemic screens. AFP mildly and nonspecifically elevated — dedicated HCC-surveillance imaging was being arranged at the time of her acute admission.
